ground_truth:
MAMMOGRAPHY REPORT
BIRADS

Patient: Margaret Stewart
DOB: 10/04/1962
MRN: 778123
Date: 25/01/2024
Tech: Jennifer Adams, RT(R)(M)

Examination: Bilateral diagnostic mammogram
Clinical History: Screening mammogram showed mass L breast.

Comparison: Prior study dated 06/15/2023.

FINDINGS:

Right Breast:
Breast composition: Scattered fibroglandular densities.
No dominant mass, architectural distortion, or suspicious calcifications.
Benign-appearing calcifications in the upper outer quadrant.
No axillary lymphadenopathy.

Left Breast:
Breast composition: Scattered fibroglandular densities.
New 1.5 cm oval mass in the upper outer quadrant at 10 o'clock.
Mass is partially obscured on standard views.
No suspicious calcifications associated with the mass.
No architectural distortion.
No axillary lymphadenopathy.

IMPRESSION:
Right Breast: BIRADS 2 - Benign. No significant change.
Left Breast: BIRADS 4A - Low suspicion for malignancy.
Recommend diagnostic ultrasound and possible biopsy of the
left breast mass at 10 o'clock.

Dr. Catherine Lee, MD
Breast Imaging Specialist
BIRADS Final Assessment: Right BIRADS 2, Left BIRADS 4A
